meaning: n.(剧本,小说中的)陪衬情节,次要情节
examples: Fleshed out the novel with a subplot.
I want to connect all the points in a scatterplot in one subplot to another subplot.
The film does have one serendipitous subplot: the peddling of offshore oil-drilling leases.
Girls only went to see Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen because of a five-minute romantic subplot?
That forced Segel to cut out a subplot where Kermit posed as an oil baron.
